layout_and_spacing.general: Prioritize negative space. Elements should have generous breathing room. Use p-12 or p-24 instead of typical p-4 or p-6.

components_and_interactions.buttons: Flat background with 1px subtle border, pure white text, hover:bg-white hover:text-black transition-colors duration-300
components_and_interactions.cards: Dark solid surfaces (bg-[#0B111A]), 1px border (#1A2433), no drop shadows, use inner glows or subtle gradients for a premium hardware aesthetic.
components_and_interactions.navigation: Sticky, backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#030508]/70, 1px bottom border-white/10, very minimalist.
components_and_interactions.animations: Framer Motion fade-in up, Lenis smooth scroll, text reveal on scroll, micro-interactions on hover. Soft, cinematic transitions.

sections_breakdown.name: Hero
sections_breakdown.description: Massive typography 'One website can't win three markets', dark cinematic abstract background with subtle blue tint.
sections_breakdown.layout: Center-aligned content, high-contrast, text-5xl to text-6xl fluid typography, lots of negative space, tracking-tighter.

sections_breakdown.name: The Shift
sections_breakdown.description: 2-column editorial layout. Left side sticky header, right side scrolling text. Highlighting market changes.
sections_breakdown.layout: Grid layout: col-span-12 lg:col-span-5 for sticky header, col-span-12 lg:col-span-7 for content. Bold, large numbers for statistics.

sections_breakdown.name: The Problem
sections_breakdown.description: Dark bento grid highlighting the confusion of mixing 3 audiences into 1 platform.
sections_breakdown.layout: Bento Grid Mode A (Tetris grid), dark cards with stark white text, pure minimal.

sections_breakdown.name: The Opportunity
sections_breakdown.description: High-contrast imagery, single stark strategic statement. Droga5-style boldness.
sections_breakdown.layout: Full width image background with heavy dark overlay (bg-black/50 or bg-gradient-to-r from-[#030508]).

sections_breakdown.name: The Proposal (3 Pillars)
sections_breakdown.description: Connectivity, Platform, Modules. 3 towering vertical cards.
sections_breakdown.layout: Grid 3 columns (lg:grid-cols-3), tall cards (min-h-[500px]), pure CSS border animations (Tracing Beam effect) or 1px sharp borders.

sections_breakdown.name: What We Build
sections_breakdown.description: Abstract UI mockups or data visualizations representing the new digital ecosystem.
sections_breakdown.layout: Overlapping abstract images, asymmetrical layout, text left-aligned with p-12 padding.

sections_breakdown.name: Strategic Layer
sections_breakdown.description: Text-heavy but highly structured. Minimalist typography.
sections_breakdown.layout: 2-column or 3-column text grid with 1px borders (Grid Borders pattern), transparent backgrounds.

sections_breakdown.name: How We Work
sections_breakdown.description: Loop diagram. Interactive or animated circular flow representing the working model.
sections_breakdown.layout: Centered large custom component (use framer-motion to spin or reveal SVG paths).

sections_breakdown.name: Phases Timeline
sections_breakdown.description: 4 phases timeline with glowing blue nodes for restructuring.
sections_breakdown.layout: Vertical timeline with sticky left column for 'Phases' and right column for timeline items. Line down the middle or side.

sections_breakdown.name: Deliverables
sections_breakdown.layout: border-collapse style table or grid, highly structured (Control Room grid pattern). Minimalist.

sections_breakdown.name: Business Model
sections_breakdown.description: Bento box style representation of the consulting + product business model.
sections_breakdown.layout: Bento Grid Mode B (Control Room grid).

sections_breakdown.name: Why WTF
sections_breakdown.description: Big typography, Droga5-style bold statement on why we are the right partner.
sections_breakdown.layout: Massive text (text-5xl/6xl) breaking the grid, heavy negative space.

sections_breakdown.name: Closing
sections_breakdown.description: Full screen dark blue/black, single call to action to proceed with the proposal.
sections_breakdown.layout: Centered, high contrast, minimalist, h-screen flex center.

images.description: Dark teal and green gradient background - sleek abstract
Professionals in business meeting signing documents
Blue fiber optic cables in data center
Rack of electronic equipment in a dark room
Angled white lines on dark black background

instructions_to_main_agent: Use raw HTML/Tailwind for layout to achieve the Vogue/Harper's Bazaar editorial look with heavy negative space.
Do NOT use generic Shadcn Cards for marketing sections; use raw divs with specific border/padding to achieve a brutalist/high-contrast feel.
Use 'lenis' for smooth scrolling to give the pitch deck a premium, cinematic weight.
Typography: Use 'Clash Display' for Headings, and 'Inter' for Body text. Use 'tracking-tight' on large headers.
Color application: The UI must be predominantly deep black (#030508) and dark slate (#0B111A). Use the primary blue (#0052FF) SPARINGLY as an accent.
Install and use 'framer-motion' for all fade-up and parallax effects. Grid items must be direct children of the motion.div.
For the 'How We Work' loop diagram, implement an SVG or CSS-based rotating element. Do NOT leave placeholder text.
Add 'data-testid' to all buttons and interactive elements.
Do NOT use placeholders for images. Use the exact provided URLs in the media section.
Max heading size should be text-6xl. Ensure responsive fluid typography.
IMPORTANT: Output your code strictly in .js/.jsx format as requested. Do NOT use TypeScript (.tsx).
Use @phosphor-icons/react for premium, duotone/thin icons that match the Ubiquiti hardware aesthetic.
